Task: Resolve conflicting answers across duplicate policy pages
AcceptanceCriteria: One canonical source is selected and duplicate pages are retired or redirected

Task: Review permissions for restricted content when ACL evidence is missing or unclear
AcceptanceCriteria: Only intended audiences can access the connected source and the review evidence is documented

Task: Add or export owner and review metadata needed for assessment
AcceptanceCriteria: Owner, lastReviewedDate, and effectiveDate are visible in the source or accompanying export

Task: Split mixed-topic long documents into focused pages
AcceptanceCriteria: Each page has one primary intent and clear headings
Regression prompt set covers top intents, edge cases, and negative tests
